channel.title: Depth_Estimation on Utsab's Digital Garden
channel.description: Recent content in Depth_Estimation on Utsab's Digital Garden

item.description: Link: https://zju3dv.github.io/InfiniDepth/#pointcloud Paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2601.03252 Depth as Neural Implicit Fields They have extended the concept of Neural Implicit Fields which maps any 2d coordinate to a depth value conditioned on the input RGB image of a fixed resolution. $$d_{I}(x,y) = N_{\mathbb{\theta}}(I,(x,y))$$ They implemented this NIF model using a Local Implicit Decoder. It has two modules: Feature Query: They use a VIT encoder to capture Global information. This is followed by a Reassemble Block .
